zh.Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Haute-Nor: 法國豪-諾門迪艾費利艾雷-賽吉拉爾

zh-hans.Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Haute-Nor: 法国豪-諾門迪艾費利艾雷-賽吉拉爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay于1049年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾費利艾雷-賽吉拉爾。她和Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay至少有1个儿子。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: Fitzwilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay was born in 1049, in Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. She had at least 1 son with Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay est née en 1049, à Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay wurde 1049 in Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay è nata il nel 1049 nel Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Haute-Nor: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアフエリeレス-サイント-ヒレアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegayは1049年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアフエリeレス-サイント-ヒレアイアで生まれた。彼女はRichard Fitzwilliam de Wormegayとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay(은)는 1049년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 페리e레스-세인트-힐어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay nasceu em 1049, em Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay родилась в 1049 г. в местности фирриeрес-сеинт-хилер, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay nació en 1049, en Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Richard Fitzwilliam de Wormegay. Murió en su pueblo.
